query: SELECT bp.bookTitle, bp.authorName FROM book_profiles bp LEFT JOIN author_profiles ap ON bp.authorName = ap.authorName WHERE ap.id IS NULL AND bp.authorName != '' AND bp.authorName IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_authors FROM author_profiles; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_books FROM book_profiles;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bp.bookTitle, bp.authorName FROM book_profiles bp LEFT JOIN author_profiles ap ON bp.authorName = ap.authorName WHERE ap.id IS NULL AND bp.authorName != '' AND bp.authorName IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_authors FROM author_profiles; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_books FROM book_profiles;
